title: Sovereign Corporate Capability Foundry
thesis: A sovereign enterprise can allocate proof missions across domains to manufacture reusable capability, not just isolated task outputs.
problem: Corporate AI programs often create disconnected experiments that fail to become durable capability across departments.
mission: Build a portfolio foundry that turns domain weaknesses into proof missions, accepted artifacts, credentials, reputation, and capability budgets.
why: This is the portfolio-scale version of RSI: many domains, many agents, one evidence graph.
goals: Move from tasks to capability portfolios
rsi: The foundry improves by learning which domains, agent cells, evaluators, and artifacts generate repeatable verified capability.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates portfolio budgets, mission settlement, evaluator incentives, proof-card actions, credential issuance, treasury routing, and commercialization milestone evidence.
